## Issue Type

- [ ] Bug Report
- [ ] Feature Request
- [ ] Documentation Improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the issue or feature request.

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**:
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**:
A clear description of what actually happened.

## Environment (if applicable)

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS Sonoma]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.25]
- Worker mode / Backend mode: [e.g. worker, backend, both]
- Database: [e.g. SQLite, PostgreSQL]
- Git version: `git --version`

## Relevant Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, add logs, error output, or screenshots to help explain your problem.

```
Paste any relevant terminal output here
```

## Proposed Solution (for feature requests)

If you have an idea for how to implement this, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem or request here.
